texto: Terrorism has no nationality or religion.I stand with all countries affected by these inhumane acts.Because of this; I am not France, I am not Belgium, nor am I Syria. I am what is left of humanity.I am compassion, I am kindness, I am love. I am the strength that those in fear rely on. I am the fight against terror.
explicacao: Citação de Aimée Jones sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Terrorism has no nationality or religion.I stand with all countries affected by these inhumane ac…” articula fe, humanity, religion em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como religion e terrorism.
